common_params.name: partner_id
common_params.description: Partner ID is assigned upon registration is successful. Required for all requests.

common_params.name: timestamp
common_params.description: This is to indicate the timestamp of the request. Required for all requests. Expires in 5 minutes.

common_params.name: access_token
common_params.description: The token for API access, using to identify your permission to the api. Valid for multiple use and expires in 4 hours.

common_params.name: shop_id
common_params.description: Shopee's unique identifier for a shop. Required param for most APIs.

common_params.name: sign
common_params.description: Signature generated by partner_id, api path, timestamp, access_token, shop_id and partner_key via HMAC-SHA256 hashing algorithm. More details: https://open.shopee.com/documents?module=87&type=2&id=58&version=2

define: Use this API to search the list of packages that have not been SHIPPED to proceed arranging shipment, and it supports various filters and sort fields.

children.description:
Use this field to filter the packages of specific status. Applicable values:

0: All

1: Pending

2: ToProcess

3: Processed


Default value = 2 (ToProcess)
children.name: package_status

children.description: List of product_location_id. Use this field to filter the packages under specific warehouses.
children.name: product_location_ids

children.description: List of logistics_channel_id. Use this field to filter the packages under specific logistics channels.
children.name: logistics_channel_ids

children.description:
Use this field to filter the packages fulfilled by shopee or seller. Applicable values: 

0: None (not apply filter)

1: Shopee

2: Seller


Default value = 2 (Seller)
children.name: fulfillment_type

children.description:
Use this field to filter the packages under invoice_pending.


Default value = false
children.name: invoice_pending

children.description:
[Only for TW 30029 channel] Use this field to filter the sorting group of parcel. This field is only available for package with package_status = 3 and logistics_channel_id = 30029. Applicable values: 
0: All

1: North
2: South
children.name: sorting_group

children.description:
Use this field to filter packages by order type. Applicable values:

0: All

1: Regular Order

2: Instant Order


Default value = 0 (All)


Note: For VN shops, using 2: Instant Order will return both Instant Delivery and Same-day Delivery packages.
children.name: order_type

children.description:
Use this field to filter packages by pre-order status. Applicable values:

0: All

1: Pre-Order

2: Non Pre-Order


Default value = 0 (All)
children.name: is_pre_order

children.description:
Use this field to filter packages by shipping priority. Applicable values: 


- For MY/PH/TW/TH shops, and VN Preferred/Preferred Plus/Shopee Mall shops:

0: All

1: Overdue

2: Ship by Today

3: Ship by Tomorrow


- For other shops：
0: All
1: Overdue
2: Within 24h
3: Beyond 24h


Default value = 0 (All)
children.name: shipping_priority

children.description: Each result set is returned as a page of entries. Use the "page_size" filters to control the maximum number of entries to retrieve per page (i.e., per call). This integer value is used to specify the maximum number of entries to return in a single "page" of data.The limit of page_size if between 1 and 100.
children.name: page_size

children.description: Specifies the starting entry of data to return in the current call. Default is "". If data is more than one page, the offset can be some entry to start next call.
children.name: cursor

children.description:
Use this field to specify which field to use to sort the returned package list. Available values: 

1: ShipByDate  

2: CreateDate

3: ConfirmedDate


Default value = 1 (ShipByDate)
children.name: sort_type

children.description:
Use this field to specify whether the returned package list is sorted in ascending or descending sort_type.


Default value = true
children.name: ascending

response_params.description: Indicate error type if hit error. Empty if no error happened.
response_params.name: error

response_params.description: Indicate error details if hit error. Empty if no error happened.
response_params.name: mesage

children.description: Shopee's unique identifier for an order.
children.name: order_sn

children.description: Shopee's unique identifier for the package under an order
children.name: package_number

children.description: The identity of logistic channel.
children.name: logistics_channel_id

children.description: Just use this field to pass the next step of Mass ArrangeShipment
children.name: product_location_id

children.description: [Only for TW 30029 channel] This field indicate the sorting group value of the package. This field is only available for logistics_channel_id = 30029 and after the package has been arranged for shipment.
children.name: sorting_group

children.description:
Only effective when the package's logistics_status/fulfillment_status is LOGISTICS_READY. 


This parameter further distinguishes between two scenarios:

- true: Package shipment has been arranged (Seller has processed shipment, system is generating tracking number, not yet updated to LOGISTICS_REQUEST_CREATED, no duplicate action needed)

- false: Package awaiting shipment arrangement (Seller hasn't processed shipment yet, shipping arrangement required)
children.name: is_shipment_arranged

children.description: Total orders can be returned with your query
children.name: total_count

children.description: if packages is not empty or length of packages <= page_size. You should pass the next_cursor in the next request as page_sentinel.
children.name: next_cursor

children.description: To indicate, it's a the last page or not
children.name: more

children.description: As same as request param
children.name: sort

children.description: As same as request param
children.name: sort_type

children.description: As same as request param
children.name: is_asc

response_params.description: The identifier for an API request for error tracking.
response_params.name: request_id

request_sample.value:
<?php

$curl = curl_init();

curl_setopt_array($curl, array(
  CURLOPT_URL => 'https://partner.shopeemobile.com/api/v2/order/search_package_list?access_token=access_token&partner_id=partner_id&shop_id=shop_id&sign=sign&timestamp=timestamp',
  CURLOPT_RETURNTRANSFER => true,
  CURLOPT_ENCODING => '',
  CURLOPT_MAXREDIRS => 10,
  CURLOPT_TIMEOUT => 0,
  CURLOPT_FOLLOWLOCATION => true,
  CURLOPT_HTTP_VERSION => CURL_HTTP_VERSION_1_1,
  CURLOPT_CUSTOMREQUEST => 'POST',
  CURLOPT_POSTFIELDS => '{
    "filter": {
        "fulfillment_type": 2,
        "invoice_pending": false,
        "is_pre_order": 0,
        "logistics_channel_ids": [
            50021
        ],
        "order_type": 0,
        "package_status": 2,
        "product_location_ids": [
            "VN0005EIZ"
        ],
        "shipping_priority": 0,
        "sorting_group": 1
    },
    "pagination": {
        "cursor": "\\"\\"",
        "page_size": 5
    },
    "sort": {
        "ascending": false,
        "sort_type": 1
    }
}',
  CURLOPT_HTTPHEADER => array(
    'Content-Type: application/json'
  ),
));

$response = curl_exec($curl);

curl_close($curl);
echo $response;

update_log_list.content: Add order_type, is_pre_order, shipping_priority request parameters and is_shipment_arranged response parameter
Update sorting group with "0: All" value in request parameters
Add new request and response field "sorting_group"
